notes.txt.content:
[12 Jun, 2018] - Tutorial cancelled due to 'technical difficulties' (teacher's cat walked on keyboard)

[18 Jun 2018] - Bought umbrella. It's sunny. Murphy's law at work.

[5 July 2018] - Depression. Also discovered my umbrella is upside down.

[23 Jan 2020] - Finally figured out why my code wasn't working... missing semicolon. Classic.

[14 Feb 2020] - Valentine's Day alone. At least my computer loves me.

[01 Apr 2020] - Joke's on me, I thought 2020 would be a good year.

[25 Dec 2020] - Santa brought me a debugging session. Thanks, I guess?
notes.txt.name: notes.txt

passwords.txt.content:

P.S. If you're reading this, you have too much free time.

wooh.sh.content:
#!/bin/bash
echo "#     #                      ###"
echo "#  #  #  ####   ####  #    # ###"
echo "#  #  # #    # #    # #    # ###"
echo "#  #  # #    # #    # ######  # "
echo "#  #  # #    # #    # #    #    "
echo "#  #  # #    # #    # #    # ###"
echo " ## ##   ####   ####  #    # ###"
echo ""
echo "You just got ASCII art'd!"
echo "Your day is now 10% better (statistically speaking)"
wooh.sh.name: wooh.sh
